[[File:Darklight detail.png|left|150px]]
'''Darklight''' is a [[quest items|quest item]] used in [[Shadow of the Storm]]. It is a [[demonbane weapon]] created from the sword [[Silverlight]]. In that quest, it is transformed into Darklight after being used to destroy the demon [[Agrith-Naar]], which coats it in his {{WP|ichor}}.

Both [[Silverlight]] and Darklight can be [[Darklight (mounted)|mounted]] on the wall of a [[Quest Hall]] in a [[player-owned house]] at 42 [[Construction]].

If lost, Darklight can be reclaimed from [[Sir Prysin]] for a cost of 1,000 coins. It is '''only''' possible to reclaim it if the player does not have a Silverlight, Darklight, or [[Emberlight]] in their [[inventory]] or [[bank]]. This restriction can be circumvented by using the [[drop trick]], or by storing an owned Emberlight in the [[Emberlight#Treasure Trails|master clue STASH]].

==Passive effect==
Against non-demonic enemies, Darklight is a fairly weak weapon with bonuses marginally better than that of a [[steel longsword]] with a lower strength bonus and a small, additional Magic Defence bonus. When using Darklight to fight against [[Demon (attribute)|demonic]] monsters, the player's maximum hit is increased by 60%.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1096470914395451392|date=15 February 2019|archiveurl=https://archive.is/zhVy3|archivedate=16 November 2020|quote=[Whats the damage increase against demons on the silver light exactly?] Treat your max hit as though it's 60% higher than it is.}} Darklight also counts as a piece of [[silver weaponry]], and can therefore damage [[Vampyre (attribute)#Tier 2 Vampyres|tier 2 vampyres]], while gaining a 10% damage bonus against [[Vampyre (attribute)#Tier 1 Vampyres|tier 1 vampyres]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Weaken (special attack).gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the darklight's special attack, ''Weaken''.]]
Darklight has a [[special attack]], ''Weaken'', which consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy and lowers the opponent's [[Strength]], [[Attack]], and [[Defence]] levels by 5% (10% for [[Demon (attribute)|demons]]) of their base level + 1.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/948619653617717248|date=3 January 2018|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/yDVqL|archivedate=24 December 2022|quote=[It seems like the Darklight special attack actually drains by 5%/10% + 1. Is that true or just an inconsistency I'm seeing?] It's got a +1 in there, yes. Possibly to ensure it always does something, even if a stat is already low.}}

The accuracy roll for ''Weaken'' is made against an opponent's stab defence,{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/793083437976543233|date=31 October 2016|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/vuwtr|archivedate=24 December 2022|quote=[Against what defensive style bonus does the special attack of the darklight/arclight roll against? The dds always uses slash.] Stab.}} and its drain effect only applies to [[successful hit]]s.

''Weaken'' will stack additively upon [[successful hit]]s unlike the [[dragon warhammer]], which stacks multiplicatively. Two successful special attacks thus reduce an opponent's Strength, Attack and Defence by 10% + 2, or 20% + 2 against demonic targets.

==Upgrading==
Darklight can be upgraded into [[Arclight]] by bringing three [[ancient shard]]s and using either the [[ancient shard]]s or Darklight on the [[Altar (Catacombs of Kourend)|Altar]] in the centre of the [[Catacombs of Kourend]]. Doing so further increases the effectiveness against [[Demon (attribute)|demonic]] monsters and changes the [[attack speed]] from 5 to 4 ticks. Attempting to use ancient shards on Darklight while not being at the altar results in the message {{mes|You require additional power from the catacombs altar to create Arclight.}}.

[[Arclight]] has 1000 charges upon creation and gains an additional 1000 charges for every 3 shards added, and can hold a maximum of 10,000 charges. If all charges are consumed, it will become inactive, with the same stats as Darklight.

75 [[Attack]] is required to wield the [[Arclight]].
